历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Nankai University in the Physics Category (including Science from 2021-2023) in Jilin Province were: approximately 1862 in 2021, 2185 in 2022, 1657 in 2023, 1341 in 2024, and 1489 in 2025. Overall, there is a fluctuating forward trend, reaching the highest point in recent years in 2024, then slightly moving back by about 148 places in 2025. The ranking fluctuation over the past five years is significant, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being approximately 1489. The enrollment plan for this university in the Physics Category in Jilin Province: 61 in 2021, 59 in 2022, 59 in 2023, 59 in 2024, and 57 in 2025, showing a slight reduction trend. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 61, an increase of 4 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 7%, which slightly eases competition pressure but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 21st (20th from 2021-2023, 21st in 2024, 23rd in 2025), firmly among the top universities in the country with an extremely high level of education. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Nankai University's reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', involving incidents such as the dean of the School of Life Sciences being dismissed for paper data fabrication, and multiple teachers being publicly reported for academic misconduct and teacher ethics issues. Among 8 incidents, 7 are negative. Douyin popularity ranking is 36th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.28 million. In 2022, there was a file-dropping incident in Henan. Overall reputation and public opinion are relatively negative, which may inhibit some candidates' willingness to apply to a certain extent. Nankai University has 14 disciplines rated A- or above, including Chemistry, Business Administration, Applied Economics, and Mathematics as A+; World History, Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Political Science, Physics, Theoretical Economics, Biology, Statistics, and Marxist Theory as A; Environmental Science and Engineering as A-. The disciplinary strength is extremely strong, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, which aligns well with Nankai University's enrollment majors like Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) and Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data), helping to maintain application enthusiasm. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination registrants in Jilin Province is approximately 110,868, slightly decreasing from 2025 (History Category 31,071 + Physics Category 80,421 = 111,492). The estimated Physics Category is about 79,936, with competition pressure basically unchanged. Provincial control line data: In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 340 points, and the special type enrollment control line is 479 points, basically unchanged from 2024, with no significant fluctuations. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, which is in the same northern region as Jilin Province, with moderate regional preference. The university's enrollment plan in Jilin Province is relatively small (about 57-61 people), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no significant regional bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors: the baseline ranking for the Physics Category in 2025 is 1489, with a planned expansion of 7% in 2026, which slightly increases the ranking number. The negative reputation may slightly suppress application enthusiasm, but the attraction of Nankai University's top 985 level and strong advantageous disciplines is sufficient to offset it. The total number of candidates in Jilin Province is basically stable, and the provincial control line has no significant fluctuations. After comprehensive weighing, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 1552, with a fluctuation range of 1331 to 1773.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellent Top Talent Plan Boling Class) (Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics, Data Science)
- Science Experimental Class (Excellent Top Talent Plan Boling Class) (Physics, Quantum Information Science, Chemistry, Biological Sciences).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) (Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Information Security, Automation, Intelligent Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Digital Intelligence Economy and Finance) (Digital Economy, Financial Technology)
- Science Experimental Class (Physics and Optoelectronic Information Technology Engineering) (Physics, Applied Physics, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Electronic Information Science and Technology, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Communication Engineering)
- Clinical Medicine (5-year program) (5+3 integrated).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Material Science) (Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, Biological Sciences, Materials Physics, Materials Chemistry)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Industry Elite) (Intelligent Science and Technology, Intelligent Medical Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering, Materials Chemistry, Biotechnology)
- Optometry and Ophthalmology (5-year program)
- Stomatology (5-year program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 1552, with a fluctuation range of 1331 to 1773. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, Tier 1 as a sprint target, and Tier 3 as a safe backup. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<1331) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1's Boling Class and Mathematics and Big Data and other flagship majors. Candidates with rankings near the lower limit (>1773) should mainly consider Tier 3's Material Science and Future Industry Elite and other majors, while also considering Tier 2's Information Science and Technology.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Nankai University in Jilin Province's History Category (including liberal arts from 2021-2023) were: approximately 263 in 2021, 295 in 2022, 311 in 2023, 312 in 2024, and 335 in 2025. There is a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative shift of about 72 places over the past 5 years, averaging about 18 places per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 335. The enrollment plan for History Category in Jilin Province: 25 in 2021, 30 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 35 in 2024, and 37 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 29, a significant decrease of 8 from 2025, a reduction of about 21.6%, leading to markedly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 21st, firmly among the top universities nationwide, with an extremely high academic level. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Nankai University's reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranks 36th (relatively hot). In 2022, there was a break in admissions in Henan. Overall, the reputation and public opinion are somewhat negative, which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Nankai University has 14 A- or above disciplines, including those directly related to History Category admissions: Chinese Language and Literature A, World History A, Chinese History A, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Political Science A, Theoretical Economics A, and Marxist Theory A. The academic strength is extremely strong, attracting high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively hot social popularity (recommended); Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese/Chinese Language) is socially recommended; Finance (Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics) is divided and wait-and-see; Business Administration is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam registrants in Jilin Province is approximately 110,868, with an estimated 30,932 in the History Category, roughly flat compared to 31,071 in 2025. Provincial control line data: In 2025, the History Category undergraduate batch line is 384 points, and the special type enrollment control line is 493 points, basically unchanged from 2024. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, which is in the same northern region as Jilin Province, with moderate regional preference. Its enrollment plan in Jilin Province's History Category is relatively small (about 29-37 people), making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no significant regional bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering all factors: the baseline ranking for History Category in 2025 is 335, and the 2026 plan significantly reduces enrollment by 21.6%, which will notably decrease the ranking number (intensifying competition); the continuous backward trend over the years (average of about 18 per year) aligns with the reduction effect; the slightly negative school reputation may modestly suppress application enthusiasm, but Nankai University's top-tier 985 status and strong advantages in liberal arts disciplines are sufficient to offset this. After comprehensive weighing, based on the base_rank of 292, with a slight upward adjustment considering the continuous backward trend, the predicted minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 302, with a fluctuation range of 250–334.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law
- Finance (Finance, Insurance (Insurance and Actuarial Science))
- Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese International Education).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Public Administration (Data Resources and Data Intelligence, Library Science, Journalism, Network and New Media, Sociology, Social Work, Administrative Management, Urban Management)
- History (History, World History, Archaeology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Philosophy (Philosophy, Logic) (Only admits candidates who fill in this major as their preference).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 302, fluctuation range 250–334. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, Tier 1 as a sprint target, and Tier 3 as a safe backup. For rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<250), focus on sprinting for Tier 1's Law and Finance; for rankings near the lower limit (>334), mainly consider Tier 3's Philosophy, supplemented by Tier 2's History and Public Administration.
